languages.text: {n}Ваш лоб с влажным хрустом врезается в нос противника. Руки Батошски разжимаются, он вынужденно отступает, стараясь восстановить равновесие.{/n}
{n}Your forehead slams into your opponent's nose with a wet crunch. Batoshski's grip loosens, and he is forced to stumble back as he struggles to regain his balance.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваш лоб с влажным хрустом врезается в нос противника. Руки Батошски разжимаются, он вынужденно отступает, стараясь восстановить равновесие.{/n}

{n}Your forehead slams into your opponent's nose with a wet crunch. Batoshski's grip loosens, and he is forced to stumble back as he struggles to regain his balance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的额头猛然撞上对手的鼻梁，发出一声令人牙酸的闷响。巴托什斯基箍着你的手一松，不由得踉跄后退，挣扎着重新站稳。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead slams into your opponent's nose with a wet crunch. Batoshski's grip loosens, and he is forced to stumble back as he struggles to regain his balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的额头猛然撞上对手的鼻梁，发出一声令人牙酸的闷响。巴托什斯基箍着你的手一松，不由得踉跄后退，挣扎着重新站稳。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alnın, rakibinin burnuna ıslak bir çatırtıyla iniyor. Batoshski'nin tutuşu gevşiyor ve dengesini yeniden kazanmak için çabalarken gerilemek zorunda kalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead slams into your opponent's nose with a wet crunch. Batoshski's grip loosens, and he is forced to stumble back as he struggles to regain his balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alnın, rakibinin burnuna ıslak bir çatırtıyla iniyor. Batoshski'nin tutuşu gevşiyor ve dengesini yeniden kazanmak için çabalarken gerilemek zorunda kalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre front percute le nez de votre adversaire qui se fracasse bruyamment. L'étreinte de Batoshski se desserre. Ébranlé, il recule de quelques pas chancelants.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead slams into your opponent's nose with a wet crunch. Batoshski's grip loosens, and he is forced to stumble back as he struggles to regain his balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre front percute le nez de votre adversaire qui se fracasse bruyamment. L'étreinte de Batoshski se desserre. Ébranlé, il recule de quelques pas chancelants.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu frente se estrella contra la nariz de tu oponente con un crujido húmedo. El agarre de Batoshski se debilita y se ve forzado a retroceder a trompicones mientras intenta recuperar el equilibrio.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead slams into your opponent's nose with a wet crunch. Batoshski's grip loosens, and he is forced to stumble back as he struggles to regain his balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu frente se estrella contra la nariz de tu oponente con un crujido húmedo. El agarre de Batoshski se debilita y se ve forzado a retroceder a trompicones mientras intenta recuperar el equilibrio.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Stirn bricht deinem Gegner mit einem feuchten Knirschen die Nase. Batoshskis Griff lockert sich und er stolpert zurück, um das Gleichgewicht zurückzuerlangen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead slams into your opponent's nose with a wet crunch. Batoshski's grip loosens, and he is forced to stumble back as he struggles to regain his balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Stirn bricht deinem Gegner mit einem feuchten Knirschen die Nase. Batoshskis Griff lockert sich und er stolpert zurück, um das Gleichgewicht zurückzuerlangen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの額が、湿った鈍い音とともに、相手の鼻に叩き込まれる。バトシュスキーの締めつけが緩み、彼は体勢を立て直そうともがきながら、よろよろと後ずさる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your forehead slams into your opponent's nose with a wet crunch. Batoshski's grip loosens, and he is forced to stumble back as he struggles to regain his balance.{/n}
